hero.title: H2H Express
hero.subtitle: Your Trusted Delivery Partner
hero.description: From the first mile to the last, we deliver with care and speed.

services.heading: How We Deliver Excellence
services.subheading: Every step crafted to ensure your packages arrive safely, on time, with full transparency.

steps.title: Place Your Order
steps.description: Submit a delivery request quickly and effortlessly using our intuitive, easy-to-navigate platform.
bullets: Enter complete pickup and delivery details, including addresses, contact information, and any special instructions
Select your preferred delivery option: Same-day, Next-day, or Scheduled delivery.

steps.title: Our Team Pick It Up
steps.description: Our professional courier team will quickly arrive to collect your package from the specified location.

steps.title: Fast & Secure Delivery
steps.description: Your package is carefully handled and delivered efficiently and securely to its destination.

steps.title: Delivery Confirmation
steps.description: Receive instant confirmation as soon as your package is delivered..

servicesGrid.heading: Our Services
servicesGrid.subheading: We do more than deliver your packages — we create value. By adapting our services to your specific needs, we let you focus on your core business while we manage the entire logistics chain.

items.title: Daily Pickup
items.description: Collection can be made from your premises or directly from your supplier.

items.title: Package Storage
items.description: We also offer the possibility of storing cancelled or returned packages for re-shipment to other clients.

items.title: Efficient Call Center
items.description: To ensure client satisfaction and reduce returns, our call center responds efficiently to their expectations and questions.

items.title: Dedicated Contact
items.description: Each e-merchant has a dedicated account manager who ensures detailed follow-up of their needs.

items.title: Delivery Professionalism
items.description: Our experienced delivery drivers guarantee effective communication and quality package distribution, reinforcing your brand image.

items.title: Fast & Secure Fund Return
items.description: Payment is made exclusively by bank transfer, guaranteeing the speed and security of transactions.

items.title: Appropriate Packaging
items.description: We offer an adapted and personalized packaging service to ensure optimal protection of your goods during transport.

items.title: Package Returns
items.description: We facilitate the return of your packages with a smooth procedure, allowing quick recovery of your goods for immediate resale.

items.title: Control & Continuous Tracking
items.description: We have created a dedicated delivery application, available on computer and mobile, with an intuitive interface.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.subheading: Need help or more information? Our customer service team is here for you. Reach out anytime — we're always listening to meet your needs.

address.label: Address
address.value: 209 Bis Lot Hay Nassim Sidi Maarouف, Casablanca, Morocco

testimonials.heading: Trusted by Hundreds of Merchants
testimonials.subheading: Real feedback from e-commerce businesses who ship with us every day.
testimonials.sideText: From solo sellers to growing brands, our clients trust us to handle their deliveries with care, speed, and transparency — every single time.

featured.name: Karim Benali
featured.text: H2H Express completely transformed our logistics. Our delivery rate jumped to 96% and customer complaints dropped dramatically. Their team is responsive and genuinely cares about results.

items.name: Sara Moussaoui
items.text: Fast, reliable, and the notification system keeps our customers happy. We've seen a 30% reduction in support tickets since switching.

items.name: Youssef El Fassi
items.text: The fund return process is seamless. Bank transfers arrive within 48 hours — that kind of reliability is rare in this market.

items.name: Nadia Tazi
items.text: Professional drivers who treat packages with care. Our fragile goods have never arrived damaged. Very impressed.

items.name: Omar Cherkaoui
items.text: The dedicated account manager model is brilliant. Having one person who knows my business makes everything smoother.

items.name: Leila Hamidi
items.text: Daily pickup from my supplier saves me hours every week. The tracking app is clean and easy to use for both me and my customers.

items.name: Mehdi Raji
items.text: Great call center team. They handle customer questions professionally and it shows in our reviews — customers feel cared for.

items.name: Amina Slaoui
items.text: The packaging service is a game changer for our brand image. Products arrive looking premium. Customers notice and appreciate it.

items.name: Hassan Ouali
items.text: Switched from another carrier 6 months ago and haven't looked back. Better rates, better service, better communication.

coverageArea.title: Our coverage area
coverageArea.description: We serve thousands of lanes across Canada & Ethiopia. When your network aligns with ours, you gain access to our dependable service and competitive pricing. We offer Intermodal shipping within our coverage areas.
coverageArea.mapAlt: Coverage area map showing service locations
